business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12); Effective Date 03/15/2026; Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building due to ordinance or law requiring demolition
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12); Effective Date 03/15/2026; Covers mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment breakdown accidents
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12); Effective Date 03/15/2026; Covers direct physical loss caused by interruption of water, communication, and power supply services

positives: Coverage extensions apply as coinsurance is 90% (above 80% threshold), enabling newly acquired property, personal effects, valuable papers, property off-premises, outdoor property, and non-owned detached trailer coverages
Multiple endorsements in place including Ordinance or Law, Equipment Breakdown, and Utility Services Direct Damage
Debris removal additional coverage available at 25% of paid loss plus deductible, with an additional $25,000 if inadequate
Preservation of Property coverage for up to 30 days during relocation
Buildings under construction or renovation are not considered vacant under vacancy clause
concerns: Vacancy clause excludes vandalism, sprinkler leakage, building glass breakage, water damage, theft or attempted theft if building vacant more than 60 consecutive days; other covered causes reduced by 15%
Coinsurance condition at 90% — penalty applies if covered property value exceeds required insurance amount at time of loss
Valuation on actual cash value basis (not replacement cost) unless Replacement Cost optional coverage is elected
Proof of loss must be submitted within 60 days after loss
Policy rights and duties may not be transferred without written consent

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. SIC Code 6512.
